name: @ebenova/legal-docs-mcp
description: Generate legally compliant contracts, NDAs, and business documents via AI. 27 document types, 18 jurisdictions. Extract fields from WhatsApp/email conversations and auto-generate documents.

EBENOVA_API_KEY.description: Your Ebenova API key. Get one free at https://ebenova.dev/dashboard

tools.name: generate_legal_document
tools.description: Generate a professionally drafted legal document. Supports 27 document types across 18 jurisdictions.

tools.name: extract_from_conversation
tools.description: Extract structured legal document fields from a raw conversation (WhatsApp, email, chat) and optionally auto-generate the document.

tools.name: list_document_types
tools.description: List all 27 supported legal document types, grouped by category.

tools.name: check_usage
tools.description: Check how many documents have been generated this month and what quota remains.
